title: careya coccinea
intro: Careya coccinea, also known as the scarlet careya or fire tree, is a species of plant in the family Sapindaceae, native to Western Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Careya coccinea include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and treat various skin conditions. Careya coccinea is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
